name: SomeIpRegisterCallback
title: SomeIpRegisterCallback
syntax: LONG SomeIpRegisterCallback( dword objHandle, char callbackName[] );
description: Enables to register/unregister a CAPL callback function for an object which has been created separately.

parameters.name: objHandle
parameters.description: Handle of an already existing SOME/IP IL object for which a new CAPL callback function should be registered/unregistered . The following objects and their corresponding callbacks are supported:
